There is a chart in the report.
Last week, I finished the report.
Sales increased ten percent.
I am going to send it by Friday.
Last week, I finished the summary.
Sales increased and profits are higher.
I am going to check it and I will send it Friday.
Good morning, David. Here is my report for last month. There is a new chart on the first page.
Thank you, Maisa. Tell me, what did you do last week?
Last week, I finished the summary and I called the client.
Great. And the numbers? What is the result?
Sales increased a lot. Profits are higher than last year.
Excellent work. So what is your plan for the final report?
I am going to check the total again. I promise to send it by Friday.
Perfect, Maisa. That is a great presentation.
There is a new chart in the report.
Last week, I finished the summary and called the client.
Sales increased and profits are higher than last year.
I am going to send the final report by Friday.
I promise the numbers are correct.

Hi Maisa, this is David. Here is a quick update about last month. There is a new chart in the report, and there are three columns with the numbers. Last week, I finished the summary and I called the client. Our sales increased. They are higher than last year. But costs went up too. The general result is good. Now I have a plan. I am going to check the numbers again, and I promise to send the final report by Friday. Thank you very much!

Hello, this is Sarah from the finance team. Let me tell you about my month. There is a big table on page two, and there are many figures in it. Yesterday, I finished my part and I closed a small deal. My sales decreased a little, so profits are lower than last year. But there is good news too. One product grew fast. My plan is simple. Tonight, I am going to write the summary, and I will send it on time. Have a great day!

Good morning, David. Here is my report for last month. There is a chart on the first page. Sales increased by ten percent. Profits are higher than last year. I am going to send the final numbers by Friday. Thank you very much.
